sections.paragraph:
m., const. followed by Makkeph קַֽן־ Deu 22:6, with suff. קִנֹּו (from the root קָנַן)-

(1) a nest, Isa 10:14 meton. young ones in a nest, Deu 32:11 Isa 16:2.

(2) metaph. abode, especially one on a lofty rock, like an eagle’s nest, Num 24:21 Jer 49:16 Oba 1:4 Hab 2:9 or as being pleasant and comfortable (Gr. καλία), Job 29:18. Pl. קִנִּים cells, chambers (of the ark), Gen 6:14.
